title: Assistant Store Manager - KFC India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - KFC India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!
